changes: Replaced 484-line verbose SKILL.md with focused 90-line version using python-pptx directly
Removed html2pptx workflow (HTML→JS→PPTX) in favor of direct python-pptx creation
Removed 18 color palettes, visual design options, typography treatments, layout innovations
Removed all XSD schemas (26 files), validation scripts, and unused reference files (html2pptx.md, ooxml.md)
Added concrete python-pptx code examples for creation, extraction, and editing
Added number/percentage parsing helpers for structured data extraction
Kept only ooxml/scripts/pack.py and unpack.py for advanced XML editing use case
Reduced bundled files from 40+ to 4 (SKILL.md, LICENSE.txt, pack.py, unpack.py)
